settings.heading: Badminton Tournament Trophy Set
settings.subheading: Winner, runner-up and category awards plus participation medals for singles and doubles events — one branded badminton set, delivered across India.
settings.price_caption: Indicative starting prices; per-piece rates fall sharply at higher quantities. GST invoice included.

settings.label: Quick answer
settings.text: Meru Trophy bundles a complete badminton tournament trophy set — winner, runner-up and category awards plus medals for singles and doubles — branded with your event, from around ₹150 a piece. Delivered pan-India. WhatsApp +91 78922 07252.

settings.heading: One bundle for the whole event
settings.text: Badminton tournaments run several categories — singles, doubles, mixed, age groups — each needing winner and runner-up awards. Our set co-ordinates all of them with matching trophies and medals, engraved with your event name and winners, delivered together.

settings.title: Singles & doubles covered
settings.text: Winner and runner-up awards for every category.

settings.title: Event branding
settings.text: Tournament name, sponsor and winners engraved.

settings.title: Participation medals
settings.text: Medals for all entrants on custom ribbons.

settings.title: Share your award list
settings.text: WhatsApp us your categories, quantities and event date.

settings.title: Pick designs & budget
settings.text: We send matching options and a single combined quote.

settings.title: Approve engraving proof
settings.text: Confirm names, logos and titles on a digital mockup.

settings.title: Delivered together
settings.text: Co-ordinated, boxed and shipped pan-India in time for your event.

settings.question: Can you cover all categories?
settings.answer: Yes — singles, doubles, mixed and age groups, each with winner and runner-up awards.

settings.question: Can you brand the set with our event?
settings.answer: Yes — event name, sponsor and winners engraved free.

settings.question: Do you include participation medals?
settings.answer: Yes — medals for all entrants on custom-colour ribbons.

settings.heading: Planning a badminton tournament?
settings.text: Send your award list and date — we'll design a matching combo and quote, usually within the hour.
